name: Cardiac Rehabilitation Procedure Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for outpatient cardiac rehabilitation services including physician-supervised programs with and without continuous ECG monitoring. Used in cardiac rehabilitation quality measures to identify completion of rehabilitation following a qualifying cardiac event.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Physician or other qualified health care professional services for outpatient cardiac rehabilitation; without continuous ECG monitoring (per session)
Physician or other qualified health care professional services for outpatient cardiac rehabilitation; with continuous ECG monitoring (per session)
Cardiac rehabilitation program, non-physician provider, per diem
Manometric studies of the esophagus — Note: sometimes referenced as superset cardiac monitoring; verify applicability
Intensive cardiac rehabilitation; with or without continuous ECG monitoring with exercise, per session
Intensive cardiac rehabilitation; with or without continuous ECG monitoring without exercise, per session
